author: bigbag
name: Record: K-LoRA + Min-NLL + FlashAttention-3 (0.6864 BPB)
blurb: Built on PR #611 (Chimera TTT) with FlashAttention-3. K-Projection LoRA (Q/K/V + LM-head), min-NLL epoch selection, per-document adaptation, 6 epochs within 600s eval. Architecture: 10L 512d GQA 8/4, EMA 0.999, SWA, SmearGate, BigramHash(2048), compiled Muon, train_seq_len=1024.
